scripts.deploy: vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.purgecache: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.purgecache && curl -s -X POST "https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/zones/$CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID/purge_cache" -H "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"hosts\":[\"$PURGE_DOMAIN\"]}"'
